button.style: padding: 10px 30px; font-weight: bold; border-radius: 5px; background-color: #1a237e; border-color: #1a237e; color: white; cursor: pointer;

div.t-attf-style: position: relative; width: 179mm; height: 89mm; font-family: {{ journal.check_font_family or 'sans-serif' }}; font-size: {{ journal.check_font_size or 14 }}px; color: black; overflow: hidden;
position: absolute; top: {{ journal.check_date_top }}mm; left: {{ journal.check_date_left }}mm; font-size: 16px; font-family: monospace; white-space: nowrap;

span.t-attf-style: display: inline-block; width: {{ journal.check_date_letter_spacing }}mm; text-align: center;

div.t-attf-style: position: absolute; top: {{ journal.check_payee_top }}mm; left: {{ journal.check_payee_left }}mm; width: {{ journal.check_payee_width }}mm; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis;

position: absolute; top: {{ journal.check_amount_words_top }}mm; left: {{ journal.check_amount_words_left }}mm; width: {{ journal.check_amount_words_width }}mm; line-height: {{ journal.check_amount_words_line_height }}mm; font-weight: bold; text-indent: {{ journal.check_amount_words_indent }}mm; overflow-wrap: break-word;
position: absolute; top: {{ journal.check_amount_top }}mm; left: {{ journal.check_amount_left }}mm; width: 45mm; text-align: left; font-weight: bold; font-size: 18px;
position: absolute; top: {{ journal.check_ac_payee_top }}mm; left: {{ journal.check_ac_payee_left }}mm; text-align: center; font-weight: bold; width: 40mm;

div.style: border-top: 1.5px solid black; border-bottom: 1.5px solid black; padding: 2px 0; letter-spacing: 1px; font-size: 14px; text-transform: uppercase;
